summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.providers; import org.eclipse.jface.viewers.Viewer; import org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ViewerFilter; import org.eclipse.ui.activities.WorkbenchActivityHelper; public class CapabilityFilter extends ViewerFilter { public CapabilityFilter() { super(); } @Override public boolean select(Viewer viewer, Object parentElement, Object element) { return !WorkbenchActivityHelper.filterItem(element); } }
